title: anacamptis pyramidalis subsp. durandii
intro: Anacamptis pyramidalis subsp. durandii, also known as the Pyramidal Orchid or Pyramidal Helleborine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of A. pyramidalis subsp. durandii lie in its alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. This plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. A. pyramidalis subsp. durandii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
